focus: Official Aside CLI and MCP surface

text: Aside ships a standalone CLI with account, exec, repl, and mcp subcommands.
Live aside mcp tools/list returned one repl tool with a sandboxed persistent Playwright/JavaScript surface.
A fresh aside mcp process requires a browser-profile/task binding before browser operations.
Separate Aside MCP tools named navigate, dom, screenshot, console, or network.
reason: The live tools/list inventory returned only repl.
